title: Michael Pennington, ‘Star Wars: Return of the Jedi’ Actor, Dies at 82
content:
ByJack Dunn

Michael Pennington, a celebrated Shakespearean actor who also appeared in “Star Wars: Episode VI – Return of the Jedi,” has died, according toThe Telegraph. He was 82.

In “Return of the Jedi,” Pennington appeared as Moff Tiaan Jerjerrod, an Empire admiral responsible for overseeing the construction of the second Death Star. Pennington also appeared in Tony Richardson’s 1969 “Hamlet” and 2011’s “The Iron Lady.”

Outside of those major works, most of his on-screen acting happened on television. His most recent TV credits include “Raised By Wolves,” “Footprints,” “Endeavour,” “Father Brown,” “The Escape Artist,” “Silent Witness” and “Into the Storm.” He also starred in the 1987 TV movie “The Return of Sherlock Holmes” as the titular detective, as well as 1989’s “The Wars of the Roses,” which was a televised series of Shakespeare’s history plays performed by the English Shakespeare Company.

Pennington was best known for his work on the stage as an accomplished Shakespearean actor. According to The Telegraph, in 1980, he turned down the starring role opposite Meryl Streep in Karel Reisz’s 1981 drama “The French Lieutenant’s Woman” so he could star as Hamlet for the Royal Shakespeare Company. Pennington reportedly said at the time, “I realised I couldn’t let Hamlet go. It is one of the prizes.” Jeremy Irons stepped into his part, and the film went on to be nominated for five Academy Awards.

Born in 1943 in Cambridge, Pennington attended Trinity College, but it was as a child studying at Marlborough that he decided he wanted to be an actor after seeing TV and stage actor Paul Rogers play Hamlet.
title_zh: 《星際大戰：絕地大反攻》(Star Wars: Return of the Jedi) 演員邁克爾·佩寧頓(Michael Pennington) 於82歲時去世。
content_zh:
根據《電訊報》(The Telegraph) 的報導，著名的莎士比亞演員邁克爾·佩寧頓(Michael Pennington)於82歲時去世，他曾在《星際大戰：第六集 - 朱迪的回歸》(Star Wars: Episode VI – Return of the Jedi) 中出演。

在《朱迪的回歸》(Return of the Jedi) 中，佩寧頓飾演帝國海軍上將提安·傑傑羅德(Moff Tiaan Jerjerrod)，負責監督第二顆死星的建造。佩寧頓還曾出現在托尼·理查德森(Tony Richardson) 1969年的《哈姆雷特》(Hamlet) 和2011年的《鐵娘子》(The Iron Lady) 中。

除了這些主要作品外，他的大部分螢幕演出都發生在電視上。他最近的電視作品包括《狼來了》(Raised By Wolves)、《足跡》(Footprints)、《奮鬥》(Endeavour)、《布朗神父》(Father Brown)、《逃脫藝術家》(The Escape Artist)、《沉默的證人》(Silent Witness) 和《風暴來襲》(Into the Storm)。他還在1987年的電視電影《福爾摩斯的回歸》(The Return of Sherlock Holmes) 中飾演主角福爾摩斯(Sherlock Holmes)，以及1989年的《玫瑰之戰》(The Wars of the Roses)，這是一部由英國莎士比亞公司(English Shakespeare Company) 演出的莎士比亞歷史劇的電視系列。

佩寧頓以其出色的莎士比亞演員身份而聞名於世。根據《電訊報》(The Telegraph) 的報導，1980年，他拒絕了與梅麗爾·史翠普(Meryl Streep) 共同主演卡雷爾·瑞茲(Karel Reisz) 1981年劇情片《法國中尉的女人》(The French Lieutenant’s Woman) 的主角，因為他想為皇家莎士比亞公司(Royal Shakespeare Company) 演出哈姆雷特(Hamlet)。據報導，佩寧頓當時表示：“我意識到我不能放棄哈姆雷特。這是其中一個獎項。”傑瑞米·艾恩斯(Jeremy Irons) 接替了他的角色，該片最終獲得五項奧斯卡提名。

佩寧頓於1943年出生在劍橋，曾就讀於三一學院(Trinity College)，但在馬爾堡(Marlborough)的童年時期，他在看到電視和舞台演員保羅·羅傑斯(Paul Rogers) 演出哈姆雷特後，決定要成為一名演員。
summary_zh: 根據《電訊報》(The Telegraph) 的報導，著名的莎士比亞演員邁克爾·佩寧頓(Michael Pennington)於82歲時去世，他曾在《星際大戰：第六集 - 朱迪的回歸》(Star Wars: Episode VI – Return of the Jedi) 中出演。
